message:
fix: restrict non-admins to only their assigned panels

H264 frames were broadcast to all connections regardless of panel
assignment, and panel input (key/mouse/text) had no auth check except
for resize. Unassigned panels were also accessible to everyone.

- Filter H264 frame broadcast by session assignment (non-admins only
  receive frames for panels assigned to their session)
- Track session IDs for H264 connections (resolve token on connect,
  clean up on disconnect)
- Auth-check all panel messages, not just resize
- Require admin/editor role for create_panel and split_panel
- Deny unassigned panels for non-admins (isPanelAuthorized returns
  false instead of true when panel has no assignment)
- Update empty state text in share management dialog
